fundamentals.name: Applied Optoelectronics, Inc.
fundamentals.longBusinessSummary: Applied Optoelectronics, Inc. engages in the design, manufacture, and sale of fiber-optic networking products in the United States, Taiwan, and China. The company offers optical modules, optical filters, lasers, laser components, subassemblies, transmitters and transceivers, turn-key equipment, headend, node, and distribution equipment, as well as amplifiers. It sells its products to internet data center operators, cable television, telecom equipment manufacturers, fiber-to-the-home, and internet service providers through its direct and indirect sales channels. Applied Optoelectronics, Inc. was incorporated in 1997 and is headquartered in Sugar Land, Texas.

judgment.summary: Rapidly growing revenue but unprofitable, with a high forward P/E and significant debt.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter missed EPS estimates by -44.8%; next earnings date is 2026-08-06.
positives: Revenue growth 51.4% YoY — strong top-line expansion.
Analyst growth est, current FY 441.7% — very high expectations for future earnings.
Forward P/E 39.28x — reflects high growth expectations.
PEG ratio 0.78 — suggests growth may justify the forward P/E.
negatives: Operating margin -8.6% and Profit margin -8.5% — the company is losing money.
Return on equity -6.1% and Return on assets -3.3% — poor profitability metrics.
Debt/Equity 25.36 — high leverage relative to equity.
Free cash flow (TTM) $-445.58M — burning cash significantly.
Last quarter EPS miss of -44.8% — recent earnings performance was poor.

news.paragraph: Applied Optoelectronics (AAOI) has seen significant analyst attention recently, with articles discussing its substantial 6-month stock performance and questioning whether the current valuation reflects its growth potential. While transceiver orders and AI-related demand are cited as drivers, concerns about a potential bubble are also being raised, alongside a recent earnings miss. The stock's high beta and volatile price action suggest it is sensitive to both positive and negative news.
